results.title: What Is A 'Quaso?' | Know Your Meme
results.content:
> 

> 

 

## How Do You Post 'Quaso'?

Often, "quaso" will be posted as a duet with somebody talking about croissants in a more conventional way. For example, "quaso" is often paired with a pretty normal dialogue about a hungry person going to buy a croissant in the morning.

> QUASO 🥐#LeagueOfLegends #fiora #vayne #creadoresdelollatam pic.twitter.com/84w3cr9ikG
>
> — leochamposa (COMMISSIONS OPEN) (@leochamposa) December 19, 2022

   

## How Does 'Quaso' Relate To Other Memes?

"Quaso" fits into a broader group of TikTok memes that focus on funny mispronunciations. Like wenomechainsama, this meme turns a familiar word into a goofy noise effect. It's kind of surreal, in that it finds fun in deranged language. [...] The croissant as a food has also been the subject of many other memes over the years likely because of its funny sound, shape and Frenchness.

  

But "quaso" is likely the most memorable, or at least the weirdest, croissant meme of the past few years.

For the full details on quaso be sure to check out our entry on the meme.

 Tags:  quaso,   croissant,   tiktok,   french,   animal,   today i went to get,   today i wanted to eat,   france,   pastry,

results.title: Officialquasi is rated "Average" with 3.2 / 5 on Trustpilot
results.content:
This company is a joke. My first order was in June 2026. I spent almost $100 and received 6 boxes (5 boxes of the white face masks and 1 box of neck masks) every box was crushed, ripped, and open. Their packaging was terrible. I emailed customer service, which I’m pretty sure is nothing but AI. I was told “well the masks are still useable.” I was also told I could have paid for shipping to have kept this from happening. Fine whatever. Fast forward to July 6, 2026. I ordered 5 boxes of the pink masks (Salmon PDRN Collagen Masks). They are buy 3 get 2 free. This time I paid for shipping and 3 day processing. It took them 10 days to get it to me. It also came to me just like the first order. Every box was crushed and open. I emailed customer service again and they were like “oh it’s been [...] After I received it I thought well I’ll give it a try. This was on a Sunday on Friday. My face was still red. It took over a week to get information on where to return. They take 20% restocking fee plus we have to pay for shipping. After all that it takes up half of the money that I spent. They said not to return a package open hopefully since it broke me out, they’re still gonna give me credit for that package. I do not recommend this product.

July 12, 2026

Jun 4, 2026 [...] While we don't verify specific claims because reviewers' opinions are their own, we may label reviews as "Verified" when we can confirm a business interaction took place. Read more

To protect platform integrity, every review on our platform—verified or not—is screened by our 24/7 automated software. This technology is designed to identify and remove content that breaches our guidelines, including reviews that are not based on a genuine experience. We recognise we may not catch everything, and you can flag anything you think we may have missed. Read more
